title: micromeria brevicalyx
intro: Micromeria brevicalyx is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, commonly known as a type of mountain tea or mountain mint. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Micromeria brevicalyx include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as having potential antidiabetic and antihypertensive effects. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is traditionally consumed in various forms, including dried leaves, infusions, and tinctures.
